title: Outsmart Online Scams in 2025
modules: Module 1: How AI Has Supercharged Scam Operations
Module 2: The Anatomy of a Modern AI-Generated Scam
Module 3: Spotting Red Flags Across Email, SMS, and Social Media
Module 4: What to Do When You Suspect or Fall for a Scam
Module 5: Protecting Your Household — Kids, Parents, and Everyone Between
Module 6: Reporting Scams and Supporting Others Who Have Been Targeted
Module 7: Building Personal Habits That Make You a Hard Target
synopsis: Every year, AI-powered scams drain billions from ordinary people who had no idea the message they trusted was machine-crafted and psychologically tuned to exploit them. This course gives everyday users the recognition skills and response playbook to identify scams faster, act safely, and stop the spread.
rationale: AI has lowered the cost and raised the quality of mass scam campaigns to the point where traditional advice like 'look for spelling mistakes' is dangerously obsolete.
learning_outcome: Learners can identify AI-generated scam attempts across at least five common channels and execute a clear, confident response that protects their money and personal data.
source_signals: New Scams to Watch Out For in 2025
How To Check If A Website Is Legit Or Scam?
Cyber Crime से बचना है? ये ज़रूर देखें!
